name: Yeonguk Choo
summary: Apache Airflow Committer with full-stack expertise spanning React UI, REST API, and Python backend. Operated a self-hosted platform orchestrating 300+ Dags for quantitative finance. Passionate about the intersection of AI and data infrastructure.

experience.title: Committer, Apache Airflow
highlights: Delivered 100+ PRs across core ui, core api, and e2e; reviewed 200+ community PRs
Designed and shipped Dag/Bundle version change indicators in Grid UI, enabling operators to detect configuration drift instantly across deployments
Fixed flaky E2E tests to improve CI stability

experience.title: Founder & Software Engineer
highlights: Architected a self-hosted quantitative research platform orchestrating 300+ Dags that ingest and transform financial data from 10+ sources to generate 20+ alpha signal types daily
Built LLM-powered agent pipelines integrating retrieval and code generation to automate end-to-end research workflows, cutting manual analysis cycles significantly

talks.title: Airflow Contributions Using Breeze & Astronomer Agents
talks.description: Live demonstration of the Airflow OSS contribution workflow and production-grade Agent automation patterns.

talks.title: Airflow + Snowflake: Building the Perfect Harmony
talks.description: Presented end-to-end ML workflow architecture integrating Apache Airflow with Snowflake to 3,000+ attendees at Snowflake's flagship Korean conference.

highlights: Founded and scaled a 400+ member open-source community, organizing 5 meetups and 3 workshops
Built and operate a community Discourse forum with 100+ posts covering technical guides, Q&A, and OSS contribution onboarding
